allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(''''version:'''', d[''''version'''']\); print\(''''peerDeps:'''', json.dumps\(d.get\(''''peerDependencies'''',{}\), indent=2\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const d=require\(''./node_modules/@prisma/adapter-pg/package.json''\); console.log\(''version:'', d.version\); console.log\(''peerDeps:'', JSON.stringify\(d.peerDependencies||{}, null, 2\)\); console.log\(''engines:'', JSON.stringify\(d.engines||{}, null, 2\)\)")
